pokemon:leavanny.name: Leavanny
pokemon:leavanny.summary: It keeps its eggs warm with heat from fermenting leaves. It also uses leaves to make warm wrappings for Sewaddle.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It keeps its eggs warm with heat from fermenting leaves. It also uses leaves to make warm wrappings for Sewaddle.
Upon finding a small Pokémon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves, using the cutters on its arms and sticky silk.
Upon finding a small Pokémon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves by using the sticky silk secreted from its mouth.
Upon finding a small Pokémon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves by using the sticky silk secreted from its mouth.
It keeps its eggs warm with heat from fermenting leaves. It also uses leaves to make warm wrappings for Sewaddle.
Upon finding a small Pokémon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves by using the sticky silk secreted from its mouth.

pokemon:swadloon.name: Swadloon
pokemon:swadloon.summary: It protects itself from the cold by wrapping up in leaves. It stays on the move, eating leaves in forests.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It protects itself from the cold by wrapping up in leaves. It stays on the move, eating leaves in forests.
Forests where Swadloon live have superb foliage because the nutrients they make from fallen leaves nourish the plant life.
Preferring dark, damp places, it spends the entire day eating fallen leaves that lie around it.
Forests where Swadloon live have superb foliage because the nutrients they make from fallen leaves nourish the plant life.

pokemon:sewaddle.name: Sewaddle
pokemon:sewaddle.summary: Since this Pokémon makes its own clothes out of leaves, it is a popular mascot for fashion designers.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Since this Pokémon makes its own clothes out of leaves, it is a popular mascot for fashion designers.
Leavanny dress it in clothes they made for it when it hatched. It hides its head in its hood while it is sleeping.
Since this Pokémon makes its own clothes out of leaves, it is a popular mascot for fashion designers.
This Pokémon makes clothes for itself. It chews up leaves and sews them with sticky thread extruded from its mouth.
